name: Apple-Raisin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 Apples; Medium, cored, peeled, and chopped (1 1/2 Cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, peel, and chop the apples. They should yield about 1 1/2 cups.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs and milk, beating well after each addition.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and cloves.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
6. Mix in the apples, raisins, and chopped walnuts.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 14 minutes.
9. Remove cookies immediately from the oven and transfer them to a wire rack to cool.
